figure.title: Detailed Flit Sector Mapping
figure.purpose: Provides a comprehensive, byte-level logical mapping of all sectors within a full flit.

technical_summary: Displays a grid representing the entire flit payload space.
Shows byte addresses format 'Sx.By', where x is the payload sector number and y is the byte number within that sector.
Explicitly locates the Flit Headers (FH0-FH2), Segment Headers (SH0-SH4), and CRC bytes (CRC0-CRC3) amidst the payload bytes.
Payload sectors range up to S155.

packet_layout.description: Payload byte y in sector x.

critical_facts: Defines the exact byte locations for all structural elements (headers, CRC) and data payload sectors within the flit.
